name: Canfor Pulp Products Inc.
description: Canfor Pulp Products Inc. is a leading global producer of high-quality northern softwood kraft pulp and paper products. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company operates pulp and paper mills in the province, supplying customers worldwide. Its products are used in a variety of applications, including tissue, printing and writing papers, and specialty packaging. Canfor Pulp is committed to sustainable forest management and environmentally responsible manufacturing processes.
